name: Code M
overview: Miltary lawyer,Major Monica Mehra,is roped in to solve, what seems like an open and shut case, of the death of an army officer, killed by militants in an encounter. The truth is far from what it appears to be. Will she crack the code?

trailers.title: Code M | Jennifer Winget | Official Trailer | Rajat Kapoor | Tanuj Virwani | ALTBalaji
